message:
feat(ext-json): add JSONB scalar function parity and blob input support

Implement 8 JSONB-output scalar functions (jsonb, jsonb_extract,
jsonb_array, jsonb_object, jsonb_set, jsonb_insert, jsonb_replace,
jsonb_remove, jsonb_patch) registered alongside their text counterparts.
Introduce parse_json_input_blob() and json_arg_value() helpers to accept
both Text and Blob inputs at every call site, and refactor core logic
into _value() helper pattern to avoid redundant re-parsing when the JSONB
variant already holds a parsed Value. Add encode_json_text() to
consolidate serde_json::to_string() error handling. Include 7 tests
covering JSONB round-trip and blob input paths across extract, set,
pretty, error_position, json_each, and json_tree.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
